heading: Calculation of a term of imprisonment
label: 3585 Calculation of a term of imprisonment
notes: Effective DateSection effective , and applicable only to offenses committed after the taking effect of this section, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 1, 1987section 235(a)(1) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of this title

children.heading: .—Commencement of Sentence
children.label: a .—Commencement of Sentence
children.text: A sentence to a term of imprisonment commences on the date the defendant is received in custody awaiting transportation to, or arrives voluntarily to commence service of sentence at, the official detention facility at which the sentence is to be served.
as a result of the offense for which the sentence was imposed; or
as a result of any other charge for which the defendant was arrested after the commission of the offense for which the sentence was imposed;
